LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROBERT COSGAYA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY ON JULY 30, 2012 AT 9:30AM. PARTIES ARE TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B BY PROVIDING COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN JULY 20TH WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR #5976

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION ALLEGE SPECIFIC INCIDENTS. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 7TH, 8TH AND 9TH CAUSES OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE KSENIA TSENIN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Set For Trial On May-13-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Continued To Nov-07-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Coscaya'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Cherie J. Edson of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (415-438-5918) appearing for defendant Robert Cosgaya moving party. No other appearance.

Tentative ruling is adopted - Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 3rd cause of action. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 5th cause of action allege specific incidents. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the 7th, 8th and 9th causes of action. Order signed in open court. Judge Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (KT/501)

Defendant Coscaya'S Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Cherie J. Edson of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (415-438-5918) appearing for defendant Robert Cosgaya moving party. No other appearance.

Tentative ruling is adopted - Defendant's Motion to Strike is GRANTED. Order signed in open court. Judge Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (KT/501)

Defendant Coscaya'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-30-2012 Continued To Aug-02-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendant Coscaya's Demurrer To First Amended Complaint is continued to August 2, 2012, on Court's own motion. Judge Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk: M. Smith, Not Reported (501)

Defendant Coscaya'S Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint

MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendant Coscaya's Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint is continued to August 2, 2012, on Court's own motion. Judge Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk: M. Smith, Not Reported (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Continued To Sep-05-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROBERT COSGAYA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is To be heard in Department 501 by Judge Quidachay on July 30, 2012 at 9:30am. Parties are to comply with Local Rule 2.6B by providing courtesy copies of their papers to department 501 no later than July 20th with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976
